title: Maintainers: add Lewis, Jan and Nicola as Reviewers
body:
They have done valuable contributions to the project over the past months.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

comments.body:
Per [Governance](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/GOVERNANCE.md#reviewer) the nominee needs to indicate their willingness here so please do so here @ninja-quokka @jankaluza @inknos

Also we need a supermajority vote (2/3) of Maintainers and Core Maintainers to override the 6 months time requirement.
cc @baude @nalind @mheon @giuseppe @mtrmac @TomSweeneyRedHat @ygalblum @ashley-cui @l0rd @lsm5
(marked as draft until we have the required votes)

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *giuseppe*, *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99,giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

Right, I am in. Thanks @Luap99

+1, I agree.

Thanks @Luap99!

Super happy with this proposal!
Thanks all, this is good to merge. Counting 10 votes in favour of 11 possible votes which is above the 2/3 votes we needed.
